case_title: ELIDA VALDEZ VS. ZHU HUIXUE et al

docket_entries.description: ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF SEP-01-2010

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VALDEZ, ELIDA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUIXUE, ZHU CHEN, LAN XIAO $4,300.00 PRINCIPAL, $76.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,376.50, THE COURT DETERMINES THAT PLAINTIFF'S CAR IS A TOTAL LOSS, AND AWARDS DAMAGES ACCORDING TO ITS VALUE. calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-25-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 11:30am
Judge Pro Tem Marte Bassi, Clerk-Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellants appear in pro per with interpreter Fau Shum. Respondent appears in pro per with interpreter Ruben Emery. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Bassi.

11:41 recess taken to find out if Judge Bassi still has jurisdiction due to the satisfaction of judgement being filed.

12:03pm lunch recess taken. Testimony to resume at 1:30pm.
1:37pm cause recalled.

EXHR (A) through EXHR (M) Photos
EXHR (N) Emerald City Auto Body estimate
EXHA (1) Diagram of accident
EXHA (2) through EXHA (9) Photos
2:10pm recess taken.
2:20pm cause recalled

2:34pm
Evidence is retained, matter is submitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Apr-26-2010 Judgment Entered
